text.title: opportunity-solution-trees Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for opportunity-solution-trees as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This is a solution, not a customer need. Rewrite as: "Users lose data when browser crashes before they can download."

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Too vague to have evidence; cite specific interview IDs or rewrite with a concrete scenario.

failure-mode.description: Agent proposes opportunities without evidence IDs ("users want speed").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs generate plausible-sounding needs from prior knowledge; require evidence IDs from a known source store before accepting any opportunity node.

failure-mode.description: Agent synthesizes experiment outcomes from prior knowledge before evidence is logged.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require explicit "results: TBD" on all experiments until real data is recorded.

failure-mode.description: Agent bulk-imports interview snippets without deduplication, flooding the tree with near-identical opportunities.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a similarity check (cosine >= 0.85 threshold) before adding any evidence or opportunity node.

failure-mode.description: Agent overwrites hand-edits in Miro when syncing from YAML.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require optimistic concurrency (etag/version field) on every Miro API write call.

failure-mode.description: Tree-rendering agents flatten the structure when rendering, losing parent-child semantics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always serialise from the YAML/JSON, not from the diagram.
